prestazioni: VR38DETT 3.8L twin-turbo V6 engine upgraded with a bespoke HKS GT-SS turbocharger kit (GT-SS82 turbochargers with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducer, and 3D-printed titanium turbine housings) paired with a Tomei 87mm titanium exhaust manifold and custom 3.5-inch Inconel downpipes for optimized spool and 950+ hp potential on E85 fuel

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with custom VR38DETT-specific fuel and ignition maps, integrated with a Plex Tuning S-Drive traction control system and a bespoke Bosch Motorsport 800cc high-flow direct/port injection hybrid setup (primary direct injectors + secondary port injectors for E85 compatibility)

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom valving for the GT-R50’s carbon-fiber monocoque chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts from GT3-spec Nissan GT-R Nismo GT3, paired with AP Racing CP8450 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers and 410mm carbon-ceramic rotors with titanium hats
estetica: Full Italdesign-commissioned Rocket Bunny GT-R50 widebody kit (carbon-fiber fenders with 50mm extended wheel arches, custom front splitter with active aerodynamic Gurney flaps, and a fixed carbon-fiber rear wing with dual-plane adjustability and integrated DRS-style drag reduction system)

Custom forged aluminum center-lock wheels by HRE (FF16 20x11.5 front / 21x13 rear) with bespoke offset for GT-R50’s track-focused geometry, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30 R20 front, 325/25 R21 rear) and secured with titanium wheel nuts by BBS Motorsport

Full carbon-fiber interior overhaul with Recaro SP-GT II carbon-Kevlar seats (GT-R50-specific bolsters and 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses), a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with Alcantara and carbon-fiber trim, and a digital dash cluster by AIM MXS Strada with integrated Motec C127 data logger and GPS lap timer
